puzzles.summary: Elon Musk continued to dominate headlines this week over his controversial role advising on US government spending cuts, while simultaneously managing his sprawling tech empire.
DeepSeek's latest AI model release continued to challenge assumptions about the cost of training frontier models, sending shockwaves through the US tech industry.
NATO members met this week to discuss increased defence spending commitments amid ongoing pressure from the US and continued concerns over European security.
Apple faced fresh antitrust pressure this week from regulators in both the US and Europe over its App Store policies and restrictions on third-party developers.
The humanitarian situation in Gaza remained dire this week as ceasefire negotiations stalled and aid organisations warned of catastrophic conditions for civilians.
Anthropic announced a major expansion this week, revealing new model capabilities and deepening its partnership with Amazon amid the intensifying AI arms race.
Jannik Sinner defended his Australian Open title this week in a thrilling final, cementing his status as the world's top ranked men's tennis player.
Meta made headlines this week after announcing significant changes to its content moderation policies across Facebook and Instagram, drawing criticism from advocacy groups.
The Bank of England held interest rates steady this week, signalling caution amid persistent inflation and growing uncertainty about the UK economic outlook.
Preparations for the next UN Climate Change Conference ramped up this week, with developing nations pushing wealthy countries to honour their financial commitments to climate adaptation.
